name: data-list
description: A list that is state-complete by construction: skeletons, empty slot, error + retry and a result-count announcement. You only write the row.

notes: Renders a labelled role=list with role=listitem rows
Announces the result count via the StateBoundary live region
Loading skeleton is aria-hidden and aria-busy

intents: render a list of fetched items with loading and empty states
list view with skeletons and retry
